currentIssues: Engine itself is structurally weak for hero use.
No explicit resolution path; wrapper must carry closure.
rebuildBriefs.upgradeBrief: Increase hero occupancy so the atom can command the phone. Add a decisive resolution path with a real threshold morph. Add a second meaningful interaction dimension or counterforce. Rebuild around one dominant verb and one unforgettable memory trace.
